sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_null (id Int32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_null (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 5), (3, NULL);
UPDATE test_null SET value = 10 WHERE isNull(value);
SELECT id, value FROM test_null WHERE isNull(value);
SELECT count(*) FROM test_null WHERE isNull(value) OR value = 5;
